parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(
  nullif($1::text, '')::uuid,
  (
    SELECT id
    FROM inbox.inbox_items
    WHERE normalized_text IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        status = 'needs_review'
        OR (
          status IN ('received', 'analyzing')
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM inbox.knowledge_items
            WHERE knowledge_items.inbox_item_id = inbox_items.id
          )
        )
      )
    ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'needs_review' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, received_at
    LIMIT 1
  )
)::text AS item_id
WHERE COALESCE(
  nullif($1::text, '')::uuid,
  (
    SELECT id
    FROM inbox.inbox_items
    WHERE normalized_text IS NOT NULL
      AND (
        status = 'needs_review'
        OR (
          status IN ('received', 'analyzing')
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM inbox.knowledge_items
            WHERE knowledge_items.inbox_item_id = inbox_items.id
          )
        )
      )
    ORDER BY CASE WHEN status = 'needs_review' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, received_at
    LIMIT 1
  )
) IS NOT NULL;

WITH target AS (
  UPDATE inbox.inbox_items
  SET status = 'analyzing',
      error_code = NULL,
      error_message = NULL
  WHERE id = $1::uuid
    AND status IN ('received', 'analyzing', 'failed', 'needs_review')
  RETURNING *
)
SELECT
  target.id::text AS item_id,
  target.user_id::text AS user_id,
  target.content_type,
  target.normalized_text,
  target.source_url,
  target.source_chat_id AS chat_id,
  (SELECT jsonb_agg(name ORDER BY name) FROM inbox.categories WHERE is_active) AS categories,
  (SELECT jsonb_agg(name ORDER BY name) FROM inbox.projects WHERE is_active) AS projects,
  (SELECT jsonb_agg(name ORDER BY name) FROM inbox.item_types WHERE is_active) AS item_types,
  (SELECT jsonb_agg(name ORDER BY rank) FROM inbox.priorities) AS priorities
FROM target;

WITH resolved AS (
  SELECT
    $1::uuid AS inbox_item_id,
    (SELECT user_id FROM inbox.inbox_items WHERE id = $1::uuid) AS user_id,
    COALESCE((SELECT id FROM inbox.projects WHERE name = $5), (SELECT id FROM inbox.projects WHERE name = 'Other')) AS project_id,
    COALESCE((SELECT id FROM inbox.categories WHERE name = $6), (SELECT id FROM inbox.categories WHERE name = 'Other')) AS category_id,
    COALESCE((SELECT id FROM inbox.item_types WHERE name = $7), (SELECT id FROM inbox.item_types WHERE name = 'Idea')) AS item_type_id,
    COALESCE((SELECT id FROM inbox.priorities WHERE name = $8), (SELECT id FROM inbox.priorities WHERE name = 'Medium')) AS priority_id
),
upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.knowledge_items (
    inbox_item_id, user_id, project_id, category_id, item_type_id, priority_id,
    title, summary, content, language, source_url, next_actions, metadata
  )
  SELECT
    resolved.inbox_item_id, resolved.user_id, resolved.project_id, resolved.category_id,
    resolved.item_type_id, resolved.priority_id, $2, $3, $4, $11, nullif($12, ''), $10::jsonb,
    jsonb_build_object('analysis_language', 'uk', 'source_language', $11::text, 'key_points', $13::jsonb)
  FROM resolved
  ON CONFLICT (inbox_item_id) DO UPDATE SET
    project_id = EXCLUDED.project_id,
    category_id = EXCLUDED.category_id,
    item_type_id = EXCLUDED.item_type_id,
    priority_id = EXCLUDED.priority_id,
    title = EXCLUDED.title,
    summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
    content = EXCLUDED.content,
    language = EXCLUDED.language,
    source_url = EXCLUDED.source_url,
    next_actions = EXCLUDED.next_actions,
    metadata = knowledge_items.metadata || EXCLUDED.metadata
  RETURNING id, inbox_item_id
),
tag_values AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    left(trim(value), 64) AS name,
    lower(left(trim(value), 64)) AS normalized_name
  FROM jsonb_array_elements_text($9::jsonb) AS value
  WHERE trim(value) <> ''
),
created_tags AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.tags (name, normalized_name)
  SELECT name, normalized_name FROM tag_values
  ON CONFLICT (normalized_name) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name
  RETURNING id, normalized_name
),
deleted_links AS (
  DELETE FROM inbox.knowledge_item_tags
  WHERE knowledge_item_id = (SELECT id FROM upserted)
  RETURNING tag_id
),
linked_tags AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.knowledge_item_tags (knowledge_item_id, tag_id)
  SELECT upserted.id, created_tags.id
  FROM upserted
  JOIN created_tags ON true
  CROSS JOIN (SELECT count(*) FROM deleted_links) AS deletion_done
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
  RETURNING tag_id
),
updated_inbox AS (
  UPDATE inbox.inbox_items
  SET status = 'ready', processed_at = now(), error_code = NULL, error_message = NULL
  WHERE id = $1::uuid
  RETURNING id
),
enqueued AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.processing_jobs (inbox_item_id, job_type, status)
  SELECT $1::uuid, 'index', 'pending'
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM inbox.processing_jobs
    WHERE inbox_item_id = $1::uuid
      AND job_type = 'index'
      AND status IN ('pending', 'running')
  )
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT
  upserted.id::text AS knowledge_item_id,
  upserted.inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id,
  $2::text AS title,
  $5::text AS project,
  $6::text AS category,
  $7::text AS item_type,
  $8::text AS priority,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM linked_tags) AS tag_count,
  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM enqueued) AS indexing_enqueued
FROM upserted;
